title: docs: update vast.ai and Sana server docs
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Server Cartography
gist.blurb: Updated our internal maps to reflect the latest server deployments, including the new Sana instances and legacy architecture.
gist.summary: Updated internal documentation for Vast.ai and Sana server deployments to reflect current architecture and decommissioned instances.
gist.impact: Maintainers now have an accurate reference for the current image generation infrastructure and legacy SSH tunnel setups.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about updating documentation/maps of servers. The bee (Polly) acting as a cartographer or librarian, organizing server maps or blueprints. A cozy server room or library setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing blueprint map of servers. A chunky retro computer monitor in the background displays lime green (#ecf874) network diagrams. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
